name: notion-expert
description: Notion Expert is a powerful Notion workspace automation tool with 46+ tools, file processing, database templates, and monitoring
author: André Cardoso

settings.name: Notion API Key
settings.description: Your internal integration secret from https://www.notion.so/my-integrations

commands.name: export-conversation
commands.description: Export current Gemini conversation to Notion

commands.name: add-database-entry
commands.description: Add a new row to a Notion database

commands.name: update-database-entry
commands.description: Update an existing item inside a database

commands.name: update-database-schema
commands.description: Add, remove, or modify database columns
